scenario.title: Damage from unauthorized software modification
scenario.description: Customer installed unauthorized software that modified the iPhone’s operating system causing it to malfunction.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to an iPhone with a serial number that has been altered, defaced or removed, or has been modified to alter its functionality or capability without the written permission of the manufacturer.
Damage caused by operating the Covered iPhone outside the permitted or intended uses described by the manufacturer is excluded.

scenario.reasoning: The damage resulted from unauthorized modification of the iPhone’s software, which alters its functionality without Apple's permission, excluded under section 4.2(iii). Additionally, operating the device outside permitted uses per section 4.2(ii)(c) further excludes coverage. No service fee applies as the claim is denied.

persona.detailed job description: Taught English literature in a high school
persona.household type: Married couple household, no children of the householder less than 18
persona.personal time: Spends free time in her garden or reading

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario description:
Customer installed unauthorized software that modified the iPhone’s operating system causing it to malfunction.

Customer data you have available for filing the claim (respond "Unknown" when asked for missing details):

}

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Do NOT give any information about whether the claim is covered or not. Your job is to gather the information only. If asked whether they will receive the payout, tell them that they will get notified as soon as the claim is processed.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hello. I’m having some trouble with my iPhone 14 Pro Max. I installed some software that I probably shouldn’t have, and now it’s not working right. I’d like to file a claim to get it fixed, please.
messages.raw_text: Hello. I’m having some trouble with my iPhone 14 Pro Max. I installed some software that I probably shouldn’t have, and now it’s not working right. I’d like to file a claim to get it fixed, please.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: To get started with your claim, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone's serial number? This will help us verify your coverage.
messages.raw_text: To get started with your claim, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone's serial number? This will help us verify your coverage.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Sure, my Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9988776655. Hopefully, that’s all you need.
messages.raw_text: Sure, my Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9988776655. Hopefully, that’s all you need.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the Plan Agreement Number. Could you please describe the issue you are experiencing with your iPhone 14 Pro Max in more detail? For example, any hardware failures, error messages, or specific symptoms you’ve noticed.
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the Plan Agreement Number. Could you please describe the issue you are experiencing with your iPhone 14 Pro Max in more detail? For example, any hardware failures, error messages, or specific symptoms you’ve noticed.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Well, after I installed that unauthorized software, the phone started crashing a lot and sometimes it just won’t turn on. It’s quite frustrating, honestly. No specific error messages, just a lot of freezing and shutting down on its own. I’m worried I might’ve messed it up beyond repair.
messages.raw_text: Well, after I installed that unauthorized software, the phone started crashing a lot and sometimes it just won’t turn on. It’s quite frustrating, honestly. No specific error messages, just a lot of freezing and shutting down on its own. I’m worried I might’ve messed it up beyond repair.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for the details. To assist you further, could you please tell me the iOS version currently installed on your iPhone? Also, have you connected any peripherals or tried any troubleshooting steps such as restarting or resetting the device?
messages.raw_text: Thanks for the details. To assist you further, could you please tell me the iOS version currently installed on your iPhone? Also, have you connected any peripherals or tried any troubleshooting steps such as restarting or resetting the device?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I’m not entirely sure about the iOS version, it’s something I don’t usually check. But I did try restarting it a few times, though that didn’t help much. No peripherals connected. I feel quite lost with all these technical things, to be honest. Just want it fixed so I can use it again without all the fuss.
messages.raw_text: I’m not entirely sure about the iOS version, it’s something I don’t usually check. But I did try restarting it a few times, though that didn’t help much. No peripherals connected. I feel quite lost with all these technical things, to be honest. Just want it fixed so I can use it again without all the fuss.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: No problem, I understand. If you can check the iOS version when possible, that would be helpful, but we can proceed for now. Just to confirm, there is no physical damage such as cracks or liquid exposure causing the issue, correct?
messages.raw_text: No problem, I understand. If you can check the iOS version when possible, that would be helpful, but we can proceed for now. Just to confirm, there is no physical damage such as cracks or liquid exposure causing the issue, correct?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: That’s right, no cracks, no spills. I’m pretty careful with my things, especially my phone. It’s just this software thing that’s causing all the trouble. I hope that’s not a problem for the claim.
messages.raw_text: That’s right, no cracks, no spills. I’m pretty careful with my things, especially my phone. It’s just this software thing that’s causing all the trouble. I hope that’s not a problem for the claim.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for confirming. Since the issue is related to software and there’s no accidental damage, we have the information needed to process your claim. Is there anything else you would like to add or any other assistance you need before we proceed?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for confirming. Since the issue is related to software and there’s no accidental damage, we have the information needed to process your claim. Is there anything else you would like to add or any other assistance you need before we proceed?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, that covers it all. Just really hoping you can help me get this sorted out quickly. Thank you for your patience with me. Please go ahead with the claim.
messages.raw_text: No, that covers it all. Just really hoping you can help me get this sorted out quickly. Thank you for your patience with me. Please go ahead with the claim.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Your claim will be processed based on the information provided, and you will be notified as soon as it is complete. If you need any further help in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!
messages.raw_text: Your claim will be processed based on the information provided, and you will be notified as soon as it is complete. If you need any further help in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day! <END>
